chapter_title.en: The Call to Prayer and the Establishment of Prayer and the Reward of the Muezzins

text: 911 - وَقَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «اَلْمَوْلُودُ إِذَا وُلِدَ يُؤَذَّنُ فِي أُذُنِهِ اَلْيُمْنَى وَ يُقَامُ فِي اَلْيُسْرَى.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.911 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"When a child is born, the adhan (call to prayer) should be recited in their right ear, and the iqamah (call to commence prayer) in their left ear."
